DEMO DATA COMPARE MODE
Status thresholds: Complete Actual date recorded On Track Planned date > today + 3 days At Risk Planned date within 3 days, no actual Delayed Planned date past today, no actual
Overview · This Week at a Glance
Burndown · Remaining Stage Tasks Over Time

Lesson Development Burndown

7,070 stage-task instances across 1,010 courses. The dashed ideal pace line shows linear burndown from project start to projected end. The solid line is current progress against plan; when actuals are wired in, an additional actual line will appear.

          State-Level Completion Timeline

          Projected 100%-Complete Date by State

          Each bar's right edge is the latest planned (or actual, when present) "Deliver and SO" date among that state's courses — i.e., the day the entire state portfolio is finished. Click a state to drill down to its course list. Top 10 states by upcoming completion date (live dashboard shows all 30).

          State × Grade Band Completion Matrix

          % of stage-tasks completed for each state and grade band. Cells are click-to-drill. 100%On TrackAt RiskDelayed

          Workstream Status
          Stage Pipeline

          Where Tasks Sit Right Now

          Each row is one of the 7 sequential delivery stages. Bars show how many stage-task instances are Complete / In Progress / Delayed / Yet to Start, segmented by owning team via the team tag.

          Complete In Progress Delayed Yet to Start LearningMate Stride

          Calendar Heatmap · Upcoming 90 Days

          Planned Stage Deliveries by Day

          Each cell is one calendar day. Intensity = number of stage-task deliveries planned that day. Use this to spot crunch dates and capacity peaks.

          Less More ■ Today
          Delivery Plan · "Deliver and SO" (LearningMate)

          Delivery Window

          When does the final "Deliver and SO" milestone happen for each course? These dates drive customer-facing rollout. The dashboard below shows the cadence, broken down by state, subject, grade group, and month.

          By Month · Subject Breakdown
          Daily Calendars

          Each calendar cell shows the number of deliveries planned that day. Subject ratios are shown as a small stacked bar (Math, ELA, Science, Social Studies). Click any day with deliveries to see the full course list.

          Deliveries by Month
          Cumulative Progress (target vs delivered as of a chosen week — Jul 13 plan)
          Weekly Roll-up · Cumulative (courses delivering each week + running total — Jul 13 plan)
          Weekly Subjects Delivering (click any week to see each course's Deliver & SO date and status)
          Planned vs Actual by Week (planned Deliver & SO vs actual delivery — on-time / early / late / pending; click a week for the courses)
          Delivery by State · Completed vs Pending (Jul 13 plan; stacked by delivery status)
          DeliveredPending
          By State · Course Detail (click a state to expand its courses)
          Static catalogue. Course Inventory totals describe the 996 raw entries / 629 distinct courses in the June 1 list.
          Distinct Course Rollup

          SEM A + SEM B for the same base course count as 1 distinct course. Full Year and Sem Only count as 1 each.

          Master vs Derivatives Rollup

          Master = original master course. 40% / 60% / 80% = state-specific derivatives. Distinct counts pair SEM A + SEM B as 1 production unit.

          Date Shift · Deliver & SO across plan snapshots

          How delivery dates moved across plans

          Each plan snapshot's planned "Deliver and SO" date per course. In the course matrix, cells highlight a change vs the previous snapshot — amber = moved later, green = moved earlier. (Jun 30 shows the planned date for plan-to-plan comparison.)

          Project 670 · Lesson Development Dashboard
          Generated: · Filters: none

          Drill-down

          Manage Snapshots

          Snapshots are stored in your browser's localStorage (per-browser, per-machine). Use Export to share with a teammate; use Import to load a teammate's snapshot here. Up to 13 snapshots are kept.

            Simulate "today"

            Set the dashboard's reference date. All "is this complete / delayed / at risk" calculations use this value. Useful for showing leadership "what will status look like on July 1?"
